age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign university, Cleared NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or similar test like SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016, Ph.D. from top 500 ranked foreign university (QS/THE/ARWU) exempts NET requirement
qualification.details: Assistant Professor - Computer Science: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018 (or BE/BTech and ME/MTech/MCA with first class as per specific options). Assistant Professor - English: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor - Commerce: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor - Bachelor of Rural Studies (BRS): Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor - Yoga: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor - Education: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor - MBA: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor - Physical Education: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018. Assistant Professor - Sociology: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject from Indian University or equivalent; NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2018.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor - Bachelor of Rural Studies (BRS)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gujarat Vidyapith Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat Vidyapith Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Gujarat Vidyapith Assistant Professor recruitment is 19th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Gujarat Vidyapith has announced a total of 28 vacancies for the Assistant Professor positions across various disciplines. This offers a significant number of opportunities for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks in the relevant subject, along with clearing NET/SLET/SET or holding a Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations. Specific qualifications may vary by discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for Gujarat Vidyapith recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 500/-. This fee needs to be paid online as part of the application process.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Assistant Professor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for Gujarat Vidyapith Assistant Professor recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor positions will primarily involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for the Assistant Professor positions. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any age-related criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor positions at Gujarat Vidyapith are offered on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to download and read the PDF thoroughly before applying.
